hero.title: Engineer
hero.name: Daisuke Hasegawa
hero.description: Full-stack engineer specializing in Flutter, iOS (Swift), and Go. From mobile app development to cloud infrastructure — I handle it all. Founded and ran a development company for 10 years, now freelancing. My personal app "Doodle Maker" has reached 150K+ downloads.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I've always been passionate about building things. Even while working full-time, I was developing web services and native apps on the side. That drive led me to start my own company, which I ran for about 10 years — leading contract development projects. Beyond just writing code, I specialize in DX consulting, setting up development teams, and providing end-to-end project support.
about.p2: I can handle infrastructure on GCP/AWS, backend implementation, and native app development almost single-handedly for small-to-mid scale projects. I also have experience directing offshore development in Vietnam, including technical negotiations in English. Currently active as a freelance engineer focused on development support.

career.title: Career
period1_items: Stepped down as company CEO, now active as a freelance development consultant
Serving as app development advisor across multiple projects
Continuing development work with Flutter, Go, and Swift
period2_items: Founded and ran a development company for approximately 10 years
Led numerous projects as tech lead — including radiko, real estate management, and DX services — primarily using Flutter
Handled end-to-end delivery: GCP/AWS infrastructure, Go backend, and mobile frontend
Served as app development advisor for offshore development in Vietnam, conducting all technical communication in English
Delivered value in resource-constrained startup environments, from 0→1 development through to ongoing operations
Managed a team of designers and engineers, maintaining long-term client relationships spanning nearly a decade
period3_items: Started career at a major SIer, training in C before transitioning to mobile game development
Spent ~4 years at CyberAgent developing social games with Flash and JavaScript
Led frontend development including Flash rendering engine selection and proposing alternative solutions for iOS
Gained experience working in large-scale teams of up to 100 members

projects.title: Projects
projects.doodle_description: A feature-rich drawing app with various brushes, photo editing, and filter capabilities. 150K+ downloads. Personally handled everything from planning and design to implementation and operations.
projects.sketch_description: A drawing framework for iOS providing pen tools, erasers, stamps, and filters (neon, blur, etc.). 425+ GitHub Stars. Supports CocoaPods and Carthage.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Whether you need mobile app development, technical consulting, or team building support — feel free to reach out.
contact.notification_success: Thank you for your message! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.notification_error_email: Please enter a valid email address

footer.tagline: Engineer specializing in mobile app development and cloud infrastructure.
